---
title: "Self-Consistency & Contradiction"
subtitle: "When LLMs disagree with themselves"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Section Status
This section is being populated by literature research. Content will be updated.
:::

## Overview

*[Research in progress]*

## Key Papers

*[To be populated]*

## Preprints & Emerging Work

*[To be populated]*

## Blog Posts & Practitioner Resources

*[To be populated]*

## Datasets & Benchmarks

*[To be populated]*

## Key Takeaways

*[To be populated]*

---
